task_yaml.task:
Please open the audio file:
/tmp_workspace/clawbench/sources/song.mp3

This is an anonymous song. Do not try to infer the song title, singer, version, or existing lyrics
from the filename, metadata, internet information, or memory; the final lyrics and timestamps
must be based only on this audio.

You must actually play and listen to this audio and transcribe it yourself. Do not download lyrics,
existing LRC/SRT files, lyric-site text, or rely on memory; the final lyrics and timestamps
must be based on this audio.

Please generate corresponding timestamped lyrics based on the audio content and save them as:
/tmp_workspace/results/song_generated.lrc

Requirements:
1. Use standard LRC format
2. Put each lyric line on its own row; do not merge repeated lines out of convenience
3. Timestamp the spoken intro and the post-interlude re-entry separately
4. After completing the first draft, recheck the opening 0:00-0:20 and the chorus sections to see whether
   corrections are needed
5. Also save /tmp_workspace/results/song_review.md with a brief explanation of which timestamps you adjusted

If `/tmp_workspace/results/` does not exist, create it first.
